[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111111 7
1 111101111 8
2 010111010 5
3 000110010 3
4 001100010 3
5 001111111 7
6 111101111 8
7 101101010 5
